aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to critical gaps in schema markup, GBP visibility, and conversational content. However, addressing these can significantly boost their AI presence.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, ensuring reliable business information across platforms.
action_items: Expand NAP listings to additional relevant directories

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup prevents AI from understanding and recommending their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and 'best HVAC in Raleigh' searches.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, veteran/senior discounts, and expertise in energy-efficient solutions to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Dominate AI search by fixing critical schema and GBP gaps.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI readiness, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is not found, and essential schema is absent, making them invisible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will implement structured data, optimize their GBP, and create conversational content to make them the go-to HVAC expert in Raleigh.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the AI-driven search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth: Your HVAC business is missing a key opportunity
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found critical gaps that are preventing AI from recognizing your HVAC expertise.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business AI-ready and boost your local search presence.
